name: Email Outreach Automation - Google Sheets + Resume

nodes.name: ⏰ Schedule Trigger (Bulk Mode)
nodes.notes: Runs every 24 hours to bulk-send to all rows. Adjust interval as needed.

nodes.name: 📋 Google Sheets Trigger (New Row Mode)
nodes.notes: Watches for new rows added in real-time. Use this OR the Schedule Trigger.

nodes.name: 📊 Read Google Sheet (Unsent Rows)
nodes.notes: Reads rows where 'Email Sent' column = 'No'. Make sure your sheet has: Name | Company | Email | Email Sent columns.

nodes.name: 🔍 Filter Valid Rows
nodes.notes: Skips rows with missing name or email

nodes.name: 📎 Fetch Resume from Google Drive
nodes.notes: Downloads your resume PDF from Google Drive. Replace YOUR_RESUME_GOOGLE_DRIVE_FILE_ID with the file ID from your Drive share link.

nodes.name: 📧 Send Email via Gmail
nodes.notes: Sends personalized email with resume attached. Connect your Gmail OAuth2 credentials in n8n.

nodes.name: ✅ Mark Row as Sent
nodes.notes: Updates 'Email Sent' = Yes and timestamps the row after successful send.

nodes.name: ⏱️ Rate Limit Delay
nodes.notes: Adds a 3-second delay between emails to avoid Gmail rate limits.

nodes.name: 🚨 Error Logger
nodes.notes: Catches send errors gracefully and logs them.
